title: Nexus Client
description: This modpack offers an enhanced, optimized, and immersive Vanilla Minecraft experience. It’s designed for players who appreciate the classic Minecraft gameplay but want to benefit from useful improvements, visual upgrades, and performance optimizations.
body:
![Promotional graphic for "Nexus Client," a Minecraft optimization modpack. The central image features a glowing, high-definition Minecraft grass block surrounded by cyan digital circuits and gears. Four feature icons surround the center: a shield for "Performance & Stability," a mountain landscape for "Refined Aesthetics & Shaders," an ear with sound waves for "Immersive Sound Physics," and a Steam Deck with a controller for "Full Controller & Steam Deck Support." The text describes the client as "Vanilla Rediscovered, Modernly Optimized," focusing on seamless performance and enhanced comfort while maintaining the original game feel.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498067ee657a7f1aabd33dea4e0ae30af8435ffe.png)
## ✨ Nexus Client

This modpack delivers an **optimized, modern, and immersive Vanilla Minecraft experience** without altering the core gameplay. It is designed for players who love the classic feel of Minecraft but want better performance, improved comfort, and subtle visual enhancements.

### 🚀 Performance & Stability

The Nexus Client is powered by a high-performance mod engine including **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **C2ME** to provide **higher FPS, reduced memory usage, and smoother gameplay**. Optimized world generation with **Noisium** and **VMP** ensures a stutter-free experience on servers.

### 🎨 Visuals & Atmosphere

Experience refined aesthetics with **Iris Shaders** for full shader support and **Continuity** for connected textures. **Entity Model Features (EMF)** and **Entity Texture Features (ETF)** bring mobs to life while staying true to the Vanilla look.

### 🧰 Quality of Life Improvements

Convenience-focused features such as **AppleSkin** for food stats, **Mouse Tweaks** for better inventory handling, and **Shulker Box Tooltip** make a massive difference in daily gameplay. **Mod Menu** allows you to easily manage and configure your experience.

### 🗺️ Exploration & Information

Navigate with ease using **JourneyMap** and get detailed information about your surroundings with **Jade** (WAILA) and **BetterF3**. **Cherished Worlds** lets you keep track of your favorite Worlds and Servers.

### 🎮 Controller & Steam Deck Support

Equipped with **Controlify**, the modpack is **fully playable with controllers** and optimized for the **Steam Deck**, featuring native-feeling adapted controls.

### 🔊 Audio & Immersion

**Sound Physics Remastered** adds realistic echoes and muffled sounds, while **Sounds** provides enhanced ambient effects to increase immersion significantly.

### 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Multiplayer & Social Features

Stay connected with **CraftPresence** for Discord Rich Presence and **Chat Heads** to see who is talking in-game. The modpack also includes **ViaFabric** for cross-version compatibility.
Fully multiplayer-compatible and enhanced with **Essential** Mod, allowing you to host worlds for friends without a server.

---

### Tested Hardware

**Gaming PC:** (Ryzen 5 3600X, RTX 3060, 64GB DDR 4 RAM) **avg FPS 200+** no shaders

**Gaming Notebook 2014:** i5-4210u with an gtx 850m, 8GB DDR3 RAM (used ChachyOS) **avg FPS 30** no shaders

> 🎮 **Nexus Client: Rediscover Minecraft with smoother performance, modern comfort, and enhanced immersion — all while staying true to Vanilla.**
